task_objective: Explain and fix why the plugin attempts backups for games Ludusavi wouldn't back up when autosync is enabled.
tests_added: tests/test_repro_eager_backup.py (temporary reproduction, now removed, logic integrated into test_service.py)
design_decisions: Harden handle_game_exit to skip backups if: game has error, game missing from preview, or no files/registry entries found.
Harden handle_game_start to skip restores if game has error.
Changed preview failure behavior from 'proceed' to 'skip' to be more conservative and avoid unnecessary attempts.
results: Plugin is now more conservative with autosync backups, avoiding unnecessary Ludusavi calls for games with no data or errors.
